UAE Industry Expertise

Industries We Serve

Deep sector-specific expertise across major UAE industries. Our accountants understand the unique challenges, regulations, and opportunities in your industry across all Emirates and free zones.

Real Estate & Construction

Property development accounting, VAT on property, free zone real estate, and construction project accounting.

Property AccountingVAT on PropertyFree Zone Real EstateProject Accounting

Technology & Startups

Startup accounting, free zone tech companies, corporate tax planning, and investor reporting.

Startup AccountingFree Zone SetupCorporate TaxInvestor Reporting

Trading & Commodities

DMCC accounting, commodity trading, inventory valuation, and international trade finance.

DMCC ComplianceCommodity TradingInventory ManagementTrade Finance

Manufacturing

Production accounting, IFRS for manufacturing, inventory management, and industrial free zone compliance.

Production AccountingIFRS ComplianceInventory ManagementFree Zone Compliance

Aviation & Logistics

Aviation accounting, logistics companies, free zone logistics operations, and international trade.

Aviation AccountingLogistics OperationsFree Zone ComplianceInternational Trade

Retail & E-Commerce

Retail accounting, VAT on retail, e-commerce in UAE, and multi-channel retail management.

Retail AccountingVAT ComplianceE-CommerceMulti-Channel

Healthcare & Medical

Healthcare accounting, DHA compliance, medical free zone companies, and healthcare VAT.

Healthcare AccountingDHA ComplianceFree Zone HealthcareHealthcare VAT

Professional Services

Consulting firms, legal practices, DIFC/ADGM professional services, and partnership accounting.

Consulting AccountingDIFC/ADGM CompliancePartnership AccountingCorporate Tax

Transport & Distribution

Transport companies, distribution centers, logistics free zones, and fleet management.

Transport AccountingDistribution CentersFree Zone LogisticsFleet Management

Free Zone Industry Expertise

DMCC

Commodities, trading, mining, energy, and related services. We understand DMCC's specific audit and compliance requirements.

DIFC

Financial services, professional services, and fintech. We have expertise with DFSA compliance and IFRS reporting.

JAFZA

Logistics, manufacturing, automotive, and industrial companies. We understand JAFZA's reporting requirements.

ADGM

Financial services, professional services, and technology. We have expertise with FSRA compliance and ADGM regulations.

Why Industry Expertise Matters

Free Zone Specifics

Each free zone has unique requirements. We understand DMCC, DIFC, JAFZA, ADGM, and other zone-specific regulations.

UAE Tax Compliance

We understand VAT, corporate tax, ESR, and UBO requirements specific to different industries and business models.

Sector Best Practices

We understand industry best practices in the UAE and can benchmark your performance against sector peers.

Industry-Specific UAE Accounting

Get accounting services tailored to your industry and free zone requirements.
